scenario.name: register-storm
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[service] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:storm-user@ims-sipp.svc.cluster.local>;tag=[pid]-[call_number] To: <sip:storm-user@ims-sipp.svc.cluster.local> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:storm-user@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 30 Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:[service] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:storm-user@ims-sipp.svc.cluster.local>;tag=[pid]-[call_number] To: <sip:storm-user@ims-sipp.svc.cluster.local> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 REGISTER Contact: <sip:storm-user@[local_ip]:[local_port]> [authentication username=storm-user password=storm-password] Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 30 Content-Length: 0
